name: terminal-demo
title: Terminal Demo
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Full animated terminal session with typing, tool calls, thinking indicators, memory blocks, and copyable rows.
docs: Pass a `script` array of `TerminalEntry` items. Each entry has a `kind`: `input` (typed command), `output` (static line), `tool-call` (MCP call with args/result), `phase` (section divider), `thinking` (animated dots), `claude` (AI response), `ask` (option list), `memory` (saved block). All entries share `pauseAfter` (ms delay before next).
